name: Bacterial Transformation (Heat Shock)

components.name: 1. Thaw competent cells on ice (5 min)
3. Mix gently by flicking. Ice 30 min
8. Plate on selective LB agar + antibiotic

notes.en: Use 5 µL of ligation product (1/4 to 1/2 of the reaction). DNA volume should not exceed 10% of competent cell volume. Heat shock at 42°C for exactly 30–60 s. SOC medium gives 2–5× better recovery than LB. For Amp resistance: 1 h recovery is sufficient; for Kan resistance: 1.5 h recommended. If transformation efficiency is low, check: (1) competent cell quality, (2) DNA purity, (3) heat shock timing.
notes.zh: 连接产物用 5 µL (= 整个连接体系的 1/4–1/2)。DNA 体积不超过感受态体积的 10%。42°C 热激时间严格控制在 30–60 s。SOC 比 LB 恢复效率高 2–5 倍。Amp 抗性: 1 h 恢复即可；Kan 抗性: 建议恢复 1.5 h。如转化效率低，检查: (1) 感受态效率 (2) DNA 纯度 (3) 热激时间。

ref: Hanahan (1983) J Mol Biol 166:557–580; Sambrook & Russell (2001) Molecular Cloning, 3rd ed.

usage.en: Transform chemically competent E. coli with plasmid DNA by heat shock.
usage.zh: 热激法将质粒 DNA 转入化学感受态大肠杆菌。

briefSteps.en: Thaw competent cells on ice → add plasmid DNA → ice 30 min → heat shock 42°C 45 s → ice 2 min → add SOC 950 µL → recover 37°C 1 h → plate on selective LB agar → incubate 37°C overnight
briefSteps.zh: 冰上解冻感受态细胞 → 加质粒 DNA → 冰浴 30 min → 42°C 热激 45 s → 冰浴 2 min → 加 950 µL SOC → 37°C 恢复 1 h → 涂含抗生素 LB 平板 → 37°C 过夜培养

detailedSteps.en: Thaw one aliquot of chemically competent cells (50 µL) on ice for 5–10 min. Do not thaw at room temperature or by hand-warming.
detailedSteps.zh: 将一管感受态细胞（50 µL）在冰上解冻 5–10 min，切勿室温或手温解冻。

detailedSteps.en: Add 1–5 µL of plasmid DNA (1–50 ng total) or 5 µL of ligation product directly to the cells. Gently flick the tube 3–4 times to mix — do not pipette up and down.
detailedSteps.zh: 向感受态细胞中加入 1–5 µL 质粒 DNA（1–50 ng 总量）或 5 µL 连接产物，轻弹管底 3–4 次混匀，切勿反复吹打。

detailedSteps.en: Incubate on ice for 30 min without agitation.
detailedSteps.zh: 冰浴静置孵育 30 min，不要晃动。

detailedSteps.en: Transfer tube to a 42°C water bath or heat block; heat shock for exactly 42–45 s. Do not exceed 60 s.
detailedSteps.zh: 将管子转移至 42°C 水浴或金属浴，准确热激 42–45 s，不超过 60 s。

detailedSteps.en: Immediately return the tube to ice and chill for exactly 2 min. This step is critical for recovery.
detailedSteps.zh: 立即将管子放回冰上，冰浴 2 min（此步骤至关重要，不可省略）。

detailedSteps.en: Add 950 µL of pre-warmed SOC medium (37°C) to the tube; cap and mix gently.
detailedSteps.zh: 加入 950 µL 预热至 37°C 的 SOC 培养基，盖盖轻轻混匀。

detailedSteps.en: Incubate at 37°C, 225 rpm for 1 h (Amp resistance) or 1.5 h (Kan/Cm resistance) to allow expression of the antibiotic resistance gene.
detailedSteps.zh: 37°C、225 rpm 振荡恢复培养 1 h（Amp 抗性）或 1.5 h（Kan/Cm 抗性），使抗生素抗性基因得以表达。

detailedSteps.en: Plate 50–200 µL of the recovery culture onto LB agar plates containing the appropriate antibiotic; spread evenly with a cell spreader. For low-efficiency transformations, centrifuge and concentrate the cells before plating.
detailedSteps.zh: 取 50–200 µL 恢复菌液涂布含相应抗生素的 LB 琼脂平板，用涂板棒均匀铺开；若转化效率低，可离心浓缩后再涂板。

detailedSteps.en: Invert plates and incubate at 37°C overnight (12–16 h) until colonies are 1–2 mm in diameter.
detailedSteps.zh: 倒置平板，37°C 过夜培养 12–16 h 至菌落直径达 1–2 mm。

note.en: Plates with colonies can be sealed with Parafilm and stored at 4°C for up to 1 week.
note.zh: 长有菌落的平板用 Parafilm 封好，4°C 可保存最多 1 周。
